name: doc-curate
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>plan>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs,compat},deterministic-output |
 lens: nielsen-norman |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: ENTRY_DOC_STYLE
required_inputs.description: Preferred style for non-root entry docs. Default is index when omitted.

required_inputs.name: INVENTORY_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: How broad the inventory should be.
